textByHash.41f7435a452763d2efdc790bb061c528b5408c28: I'm afraid I cannot offer to upgrade any Void Knight armour for you. You do not satisfy the order's requirements.
textByHash.67175853964d76f7a038a5ac63fcaf4526312550: Do you wish me to upgrade any Void Knight armour for you?
textByHash.f60fb4d93a5b8468b4e00310489d1696a1a96371: The top and robes can be upgraded, separately, to give each piece a +3 prayer bonus. It costs 200 Commendation points to upgrade each item.
textByHash.99f78b4c1539b8cb355f1e916481510531c61fa5: Very well. Hand me the top or robe you wish me to upgrade. It costs 200 Commendation points to upgrade each item.
textByHash.528e76392330e0bdd0c732599ee18473f9678658: Certainly. How much do you want?
textByHash.071034fd617b2152d2ab4db668949dcefd66577f: I'm afraid that cannot be upgraded.
textByHash.aeb4a942442ae7576d493c5ddb1ffcdc29f64e10: What a peculiar orb. It doesn't seem useful, but it does seem rather interesting still...
textByHash.8aa22580f221b840657fb344b6cb801f437f9af7: I can offer you something in return. Somebody donated us a large quantity of green paint, but it doesn't exactly work with our existing palette.
textByHash.27ffb17ecbb50d0d2c548f3974ee12be89966c96: If you would like more of that paint, just ask. We have... too much of it.
